节点.功能描述: Layout constraint, include the max size, the min size and the reference size for children to calculate percent.
MaxSize
MinSize
PercentReference, if the size unit of the child nodes is percentage, then they use PercentReference to calculate the px size.
Defines the cross-language options.
Defines if it enables setting attributes cross-language. Default value is false.
Enum for the expand mode.
Do not expand the children of node.
Expand the children of node.
Expand the children of node if needed.
Defines FrameNode.
Constructor.
注释信息: @param { UIContext } uiContext - uiContext used to create the FrameNode

parameters.说明: uiContext used to create the FrameNode

节点.功能描述: Get the RenderNode in FrameNode.
注释信息: @returns { RenderNode | null } - Returns a RenderNode inside the FrameNode, or null if not contained.
节点.return_description: - Returns a RenderNode inside the FrameNode, or null if not contained.

节点.功能描述: Return a flag to indicate whether the current FrameNode can be modified. Indicates whether the FrameNode supports appendChild, insertChildAfter, removeChild, clearChildren.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } - Returns true if the FrameNode can be modified, otherwise return false.
节点.return_description: - Returns true if the FrameNode can be modified, otherwise return false.

节点.功能描述: Add child to the end of the FrameNode's children.
注释信息: @param { FrameNode } node - The node will be added.
@throws { BusinessError } 100021 - The FrameNode is not modifiable.

节点.功能描述: Add child to the current FrameNode.
注释信息: @param { FrameNode } child - The node will be added.
@param { FrameNode | null } sibling - The new node is added after this node. When sibling is null, insert node as the first children of the node.
@throws { BusinessError } 100021 - The FrameNode is not modifiable.

parameters.说明: The new node is added after this node. When sibling is null, insert node as the first children of the node.

节点.功能描述: Remove child from the current FrameNode.
注释信息: @param { FrameNode } node - The node will be removed.
@throws { BusinessError } 100021 - The FrameNode is not modifiable.

节点.功能描述: Clear children of the current FrameNode.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 100021 - The FrameNode is not modifiable.

节点.功能描述: Get a child of the current FrameNode by index.
注释信息: @param { number } index - The index of the desired node in the children of FrameNode.
@returns { FrameNode | null } - Returns a FrameNode. When the required node does not exist, returns null.

parameters.说明: The index of the desired node in the children of FrameNode.

节点.return_description: - Returns a FrameNode. When the required node does not exist, returns null.

节点.功能描述: Get a child of the current FrameNode by index.
注释信息: @param { number } index - The index of the desired node in the children of FrameNode.
@param { ExpandMode } expandMode - The expand mode. Default value is ExpandMode.EXPAND.
@returns { FrameNode | null } - Returns a FrameNode. When the required node does not exist, returns null.

parameters.说明: The index of the desired node in the children of FrameNode.
The expand mode. Default value is ExpandMode.EXPAND.

节点.return_description: - Returns a FrameNode. When the required node does not exist, returns null.

节点.return_description: - Return all valid FrameNode collections.

节点.功能描述: This callback will be triggered when a FrameNode is bound.
注释信息: @param { FrameNode } target - The bound FrameNode node.

节点.功能描述: This callback will be triggered when the binding is released.
Call this callback when loading for the first time or when a new node slides in.Used to generate custom IDs, developers need to ensure the uniqueness of the IDs themselves.
注释信息: @param { number } index - Load the index value of the data.
@returns { number } - Returning the developer's custom ID requires the developer to ensure its uniqueness.
节点.return_description: - Returning the developer's custom ID requires the developer to ensure its uniqueness.

节点.功能描述: Call this callback when loading for the first time or when a new node slides in.
注释信息: @param { number } index - Load the index value of the data.
@returns { FrameNode } - Returns the FrameNode node that loads the node.
节点.return_description: - Returns the FrameNode node that loads the node.

节点.功能描述: Called when the child node is about to be destroyed.
注释信息: @param { number } id - The child node ID that is about to be destroyed.
@param { FrameNode } node - The FrameNode node that is about to be destroyed.

节点.功能描述: Call this callback when reloading or reusing.
注释信息: @param { number } id - The index value of the reloaded data.

节点.功能描述: Add a NodeAdapter to bind to the node.A node can only be bound to one NodeAdapter. Binding failure returns false.
注释信息: @param { NodeAdapter } adapter - Define lazy loading classes.
@param { FrameNode } node - The bound FrameNode node.
节点.return_description: Return the binding result.

节点.功能描述: Remove the bound NodeAdapter from the node.A node can only be bound to one NodeAdapter.
注释信息: @param { FrameNode } node - Unbind the FrameNode node.
